name: SetBank
doc:
SUB FASTCALL SetBank(bankNumber AS UByte)

Place the bank indicated by bankNumber in the memory slot between $C000 and $FFFF and update the system variable BANKM.
Only works on 128K and compatible models.

Parameters:
    bankNumber: bank number to place at $C000

Danger: If your program exceeds address $C000 this may cause problems. Use at your own risk.

name: GetBank
doc:
FUNCTION FASTCALL GetBank() AS UByte

Return the memory bank currently placed at $C000, based on the system variable BANKM.
Only works on 128K and compatible models.

Returns:
    Bank number (UByte) placed at $C000.

name: SetCodeBank
doc:
SUB SetCodeBank(bankNumber AS UByte)

Place the bank indicated by bankNumber in the slot between $C000 and $FFFF, copy its contents to $8000–$BFFF, then restore the bank that was at $C000 before.
Only works on 128K and compatible models.

Parameters:
    bankNumber: bank number to copy to $8000–$BFFF

Danger: The contents of memory between $8000 and $BFFF are lost. If your program exceeds $8000 this may cause problems. Use at your own risk.
